signals.headline: On April 14, 2026, Donald Trump confirmed he posted an AI-generated image on **Truth Social** showing himself with divin
signals.raw: On April 14, 2026, Donald Trump confirmed he posted an AI-generated image on **Truth Social** showing himself with divine light healing a man in a hospital bed, which he described as portraying "me as a doctor" related to the Red Cross—not a Christ-like figure as critics claimed[1][2].

signals.headline: Bitcoin Hits $75,000 as XRP, Ethereum, and Solana Surge on Iran-US Peace Talks Resumption | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Hits $75,000 as XRP, Ethereum, and Solana Surge on Iran-US Peace Talks Resumption | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Iran signaling intent to resume peace talks with the US has driven a market-wide rally, with Bitcoin breaking above $75,000 (up 5.9%), Solana up 6.3%, Ethereum up 8.6%, and XRP up 4.2%—marking Bitcoin's first close above $75k since mid-March after war-related pressure kept it below

signals.raw: The **White House** deleted the post following outcry from high-profile Christian supporters and MAGA Republicans, though it has not commented on why; this occurs amid Trump's growing feud with Pope Leo[1][2].
